tutorial.step01.title: Open the map
tutorial.step01.description: Inspect nearby cities to identify a useful transport corridor.
tutorial.step02.title: Choose two cities
tutorial.step02.description: Select a route with strong passenger demand.
tutorial.step03.title: Lay track
tutorial.step03.description: Build a simple direct line between both cities.
tutorial.step04.title: Buy a train
tutorial.step04.description: Pick a locomotive suited for the route length and expected traffic.
tutorial.step05.title: Create the line
tutorial.step05.description: Assign your train to the new line.
tutorial.step06.title: Set the timetable
tutorial.step06.description: Choose a realistic service frequency based on demand.
tutorial.step07.title: Start service
tutorial.step07.description: Start operations and observe passenger flow.
tutorial.step08.title: Monitor demand
tutorial.step08.description: Open the demand panel to spot peaks.
tutorial.step09.title: Tune pricing
tutorial.step09.description: Adjust ticket prices to optimize occupancy.
tutorial.step10.title: Reach profitability
tutorial.step10.description: Keep positive line profit for one full cycle.
tutorial.step10.reward: Tip: early profitability accelerates your entire expansion.
help.tooltip.profitMargin.title: Profit margin
help.tooltip.profitMargin.body: Shows the percentage of profit after operating costs.
help.tooltip.signalDensity.title: Signal density
help.tooltip.signalDensity.body: More signals let you run more trains safely.
help.tooltip.demandForecast.title: Demand forecast
help.tooltip.demandForecast.body: Estimates ridership trends by time and area.
help.glossary.definition.headway: Time gap between two consecutive trains on the same line.
help.glossary.definition.loadFactor: Average share of occupied seats per trip.
help.glossary.definition.operatingRatio: Ratio between operating costs and generated revenue.
